sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT, date_text TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP, updated_at TIMESTAMP);
SELECT id, strptime(date_text, ['%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S', '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S']) AS parsed_date FROM test_dates WHERE parsed_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, created_at, updated_at, (strptime(date_text, ['%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S', '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S']) - created_at) AS time_diff FROM test_dates WHERE date_text <> '';
SELECT id, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY strptime(date_text, ['%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S', '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S'])) AS count_per_date FROM test_dates WHERE date_text IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_dates AS SELECT id, strptime(date_text, ['%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S', '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S']) AS parsed_date FROM test_dates;
SELECT t1.id, t1.parsed_date, (DATE '2023-01-01' - DATE '2022-12-31') AS date_diff FROM temp_dates t1 WHERE t1.parsed_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, MAX((strptime(date_text, ['%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S', '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S']) - updated_at)) AS max_time_diff FROM test_dates GROUP BY id HAVING max_time_diff > INTERVAL '1 day';
SELECT DISTINCT t1.id, t2.id, (strptime(t1.date_text, ['%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S']) - strptime(t2.date_text, ['%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S'])) AS diff FROM test_dates t1 JOIN test_dates t2 ON t1.id < t2.id;
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (4, '32/13/2023 25:00:00', NOW(), NOW());
SELECT id, strptime(date_text, ['%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S', '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S']) AS parsed_date FROM test_dates WHERE parsed_date IS NULL;
